scripts.e2e: npm run e2e:advisor && npm run e2e:web-search && npm run e2e:comment-reply
scripts.e2e:netlify: npx netlify-cli@latest dev:exec --context production -- npm run e2e
scripts.e2e:netlify:advisor: npx netlify-cli@latest dev:exec --context production -- npm run e2e:advisor
scripts.e2e:netlify:comment-reply: npx netlify-cli@latest dev:exec --context production -- npm run e2e:comment-reply
scripts.e2e:netlify:web-search: npx netlify-cli@latest dev:exec --context production -- npm run e2e:web-search
